summary: Comprehensive testing of Associated Accounts feature completed. Fixed profile selection modal not appearing after login. All 16 backend API tests pass (100%). All frontend features working correctly.

fixed_in_this_iteration.issue: Profile selection modal not appearing after login due to PublicRoute auto-redirect
fixed_in_this_iteration.fix: Removed PublicRoute wrapper from Login route in App.js and added manual redirect logic in Login.jsx

seed_data_creation: Parent account (test@example.com) already has child account (filho@example.com) associated
context_for_next_testing_agent: Associated Accounts feature fully functional. Login with test@example.com shows profile selection modal with 2 profiles: 'João Teste (Treinador)' and 'Responsável de Pedro Filho'. Profile switching works via sidebar user menu. Settings page shows associated accounts list with ability to add/remove. Yellow banner appears when viewing as associated account.

mocked_apis.email_notifications: MOCKED - Resend API not configured, emails logged but not sent

login_profile_modal.description: Profile selection modal appears after login when user has multiple profiles

get_associated_accounts.description: Returns list of associated accounts for current user

search_user_to_associate.description: Searches for user by email to associate

associate_account.description: Associates a child account with parent

remove_association.description: Removes association between parent and child

switch_profile.description: Switches between self and associated profiles

settings_associated_section.description: Settings page shows 'Contas Associadas' section with list and add button

sidebar_profile_switcher.description: User menu in sidebar shows 'Mudar Perfil' section with profile options

viewing_as_banner.description: Yellow banner appears at top of sidebar when viewing as associated account
